runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "make", "package_manager": "go", "build_commands": ["make esbuild"], "install_commands": ["apk add --no-cache make bash curl"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "as defined by go.version (not provided in snippet)", "system_packages": ["bash", "curl", "make"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "golang: tip-alpine3.23", "base_image_rationale": "Official Go image on Alpine suitable for building esbuild as a small, portable CLI", "pitfalls": ["The repo's Makefile references a Go version from go.version; ensure that the version matches in the build context", "The esbuild build uses CGO_ENABLED=0; ensure CGO is disabled in the container"], "notes": "Consider multi-stage Dockerfile to copy the built esbuild binary into a minimal runtime image."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Stage 1: Build esbuild from source
FROM golang:tip-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Install build tools
RUN apk add --no-cache make bash curl nodejs npm

WORKDIR /src

# Copy Go module files first for better caching
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build esbuild from source (CGO_ENABLED=0 is set in the Makefile)
RUN make esbuild

# Stage 2: Minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

# Ensure TLS certs are available (for any network access the binary might need)
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Create a non-root user to run the binary safely
RUN adduser -D esbuild

# Copy the built binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /src/esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild

# Set permissions and user
RUN chown esbuild:esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild
USER esbuild
WORKDIR /home/esbuild

# Default command: show help, but allow overrides on container run
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/esbuild"]
CMD ["--help"]

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Build esbuild from source
FROM golang:tip-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Install build tools
RUN apk add --no-cache make bash curl

WORKDIR /src

# Copy Go module files first for better caching
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build esbuild from source (CGO_ENABLED=0 is set in the Makefile)
RUN make esbuild

# Stage 2: Minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

# Ensure TLS certs are available (for any network access the binary might need)
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Create a non-root user to run the binary safely
RUN adduser -D esbuild

# Copy the built binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /src/esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild

# Set permissions and user
RUN chown esbuild:esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild
USER esbuild
WORKDIR /home/esbuild

# Default command: show help, but allow overrides on container run
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/esbuild"]
CMD ["--help"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Build esbuild from source
FROM golang:tip-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Install build tools
RUN apk add --no-cache make bash curl nodejs npm

WORKDIR /src

# Copy Go module files first for better caching
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build esbuild from source (CGO_ENABLED=0 is set in the Makefile)
RUN make esbuild

# Stage 2: Minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

# Ensure TLS certs are available (for any network access the binary might need)
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Create a non-root user to run the binary safely
RUN adduser -D esbuild

# Copy the built binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /src/esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild

# Set permissions and user
RUN chown esbuild:esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild
USER esbuild
WORKDIR /home/esbuild

# Default command: show help, but allow overrides on container run
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/esbuild"]
CMD ["--help"]
"}

artifacts.content:
# Stage 1: Build esbuild from source
FROM golang:tip-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Install build tools
RUN apk add --no-cache make bash curl nodejs npm

WORKDIR /src

# Copy Go module files first for better caching
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Build esbuild from source (CGO_ENABLED=0 is set in the Makefile)
RUN make esbuild

# Stage 2: Minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23

# Ensure TLS certs are available (for any network access the binary might need)
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Create a non-root user to run the binary safely
RUN adduser -D esbuild

# Copy the built binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /src/esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild

# Set permissions and user
RUN chown esbuild:esbuild /usr/local/bin/esbuild
USER esbuild
WORKDIR /home/esbuild

# Default command: show help, but allow overrides on container run
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/esbuild"]
CMD ["--help"]
